allow: PowerShell(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\node.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\nvm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5)

PowerShell($paths = @\("C:\\Program Files\\nodejs","C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\nodejs","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\nvm","C:\\nvm","$env:ProgramFiles\\nvm"\); foreach\($p in $paths\){ if\(Test-Path $p\){ Get-ChildItem $p -Filter "node.exe" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 3 } })
